reasoning: I will vote for TMC because Didi protects us. I have voted for her since 2011 and I will vote for her until I die. That Shantanu Thakur and his BJP, they call people like me ghuspaithiya on television—they say we don't belong in our own land. But Mamata Banerjee promised no NRC in Bengal, and I believe her. My daughter got Kanyashree, my family eats because of Didi's two-rupee rice. Yes, there is corruption by panchayat people, but Didi fights for us. The BJP would have me prove I belong here, in the land my grandfather's grandfather plowed. That fear in my chest—only Didi can keep that fear from becoming true.
primary_drivers: Fear of NRC/CAA and BJP's targeting of Muslims as infiltrators
Deep loyalty to Mamata and belief she will protect him from BJP's policies
Dependence on TMC-provided social welfare (Kanyashree, subsidized rice)
